description: Set a history of a flowknot variable. Review the common c history commands. The history can be assigned a name for later reference with the optional name keyword. If not, the history will be given a default name based on its internally assigned id number.

keywords.name: flowknot-id
keywords.description: Set history location at the flowknot with ID i .

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: Set history location at the position v . The flowknot closest to v will be used to provde the history values.

keywords.name: pore-pressure
keywords.description: Set a history of flowknot pore-pressure.

keywords.name: temperature
keywords.description: Set a history of flowknot temperature.
